It effectively promotes the decomposition of organic waste, food residues and toilet paper - thus preventing odours. The septic tank activator breaks down sediments, sludge and crusts so that the septic tank or cesspool does not need to be frequently exported and cleaned. It saves you money, time and worry - for example, when the septic tank becomes completely clogged. Tierra Verde septic tank bacteria is used to start the decomposition process (when the septic tank or sewage treatment plant is first put into operation). Restores the balance in the septic tank or cesspool (after its export, after a long break in use, in case of septic tank clogging). You can use the Spray Chamber for replacement in the event that the existingmust be cleaned and disinfected to prevent contamination with bacteria or contamination with injected drugs and to maintain the effectiveness and hygienic safety of the inhaler.
